result:
[[A2]]

to: info@example.com (Dan Marsh)
subject: Good to meet you at the tower

Dan,

Good to meet you at the Coastal Collective exchange. You told me to sell the experience and leave the pricing to the platform. I have already leaned on that in how we talk to the hotels, and what you said about the booking system lifting the cancellation headache stuck with me too.

It turns out we are nearly neighbours. Hillside Farm sits at the foot of your mountain, over at the foothills, and the families and couples who come to us would happily wander up for a tasting or a class while they are in the hills. Point a few our way whenever it suits and we will gladly do the same. You and the family would be welcome to come out for a ride and a look around whenever you like.

Let's stay in touch.

Sam Tan
Director, Hillside Farm
